CONTENT.Career: Keller made his professional debut for FC Ingolstadt in the 3. Liga on 22 July 2019, starting in the away match against Carl Zeiss Jena which finished as a 2–1 win.On 27 April 2022, Keller signed a three-year contract with 1. FC Heidenheim, effective from 1 July 2022.
CONTENT.External links: Thomas Keller at DFB (also available in German)Thomas Keller at kicker (in German)

SUMMARY: Thomas Leon Keller (born 5 August 1999) is a German professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Bundesliga club 1. FC Heidenheim.
